summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-raising action is planned. Most open PRs are preserved as independent inventory items; security-shaped PRs are routed to central security handling; maintainer/technical review decisions are scoped as needs_human.
